mapper.sql: id, snapshot_id, fund_asset_id, fund_code, fund_name, buy_status, daily_purchase_limit, returns_as_of, top_holdings_as_of, public_holdings_status, one_month_return, three_months_return, six_months_return, one_year_return, three_years_return, field_sources_json, missing_reasons_json, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fund_detail_item ( snapshot_id, fund_asset_id, fund_code, fund_name, buy_status, daily_purchase_limit, returns_as_of, top_holdings_as_of, public_holdings_status, one_month_return, three_months_return, six_months_return, one_year_return, three_years_return, field_sources_json, missing_reasons_json ) VALUES ( #{snapshotId}, #{fundAssetId}, #{fundCode}, #{fundName}, #{buyStatus}, #{dailyPurchaseLimit}, #{returnsAsOf}, #{topHoldingsAsOf}, #{publicHoldingsStatus}, #{oneMonthReturn}, #{threeMonthsReturn}, #{sixMonthsReturn}, #{oneYearReturn}, #{threeYearsReturn}, #{fieldSourcesJson}, #{missingReasonsJson} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM fund_detail_item WHERE snapshot_id = #{snapshotId} ORDER BY id ASC
